name: UnitedStats dataset
description: Every Manchester United match since 1886 with goal events, lineups, Elo history, and season summaries. Coverage varies by facet; see the events_complete and has_lineup flags and the site's /data page.
attribution: UnitedStats. Result data: engsoccerdata, openfootball, Wikipedia. Player record totals: Wikipedia Manchester United player lists. Player images: Wikidata and Wikimedia Commons.
